# Demonstration catalogue photography

The bundled product images are downloaded, local demonstration assets sourced from Unsplash image IDs used in this project. They are included to keep the Netlify build independent of temporary hotlinks.

They are not represented as photographs of Royco Jewellers stock. Replace them with Royco-owned, approved product and showroom photography before a public commercial launch.
